args.ArtifactMetadata: {"ArtifactType":"task","RequestFeedback":false,"Summary":"Task checklist for implementing the premium dark theme integrations block with background grid, dark nodes, rectangular center card, and custom beams. Track tasks for layout, grid, nodes, beams, and build check."}
args.CodeContent:
"# Dark Theme Integrations Section Checklist

- [/] Implement Dark Theme Integrations Section in `features-section-14.tsx`
  - [ ] Add dark section container (`bg-neutral-950`) and background grid overlay with radial mask
  - [ ] Update header texts to high contrast white/grey
  - [ ] Implement rectangular center node: `AI Greentick Hub` with green outer glow
  - [ ] Style 12 side nodes as dark cards with brand-color corner badges
  - [ ] Configure 12 symmetric `AnimatedBeam` paths with green laser gradients
  - [ ] Add dark outline CTA button at the bottom
- [ ] Run Next.js build to verify compilation
- [ ] Verify UI layout visually in local dev server
"
args.Description: "Update task.md to track dark integrations section tasks."
